name: Martin Alderson
bio: Writing up my thoughts on the AI transformation

tweets.text: Very interesting. Think we are going to see a lot more of this soon.
Wrote some thoughts on why on device agentic AI is proving so elusive: https://t.co/POrHpw4Saj https://t.co/LekSAeF3mM
RT @t_blom: The entire Accenture workforce is about to be outperformed by a 24-year-old who learned Claude Code last Tuesday.
Some really insightful thinking from @rowlsmanthorpe on the potential labour market disruption https://t.co/y6VSwFqvjH

RT @martinald: Found a cool pattern for running AI code reviews with @opencode, without a seperate SaaS subscription.

This graph from @METR_Evals got updated with Opus 4.6. Probably the most important graph out there right now. By the end of the year AI will be doing week long tasks if this holds up (in maybe 1% of that time)... https://t.co/1mCGU8fJza
RT @noahzweben: Announcing a new Claude Code feature: Remote Control. It's rolling out now to Max users in research preview. Try it with /r…
RT @rseroter: Is your favorite web framework a token hog? Or can AI build an app with your preferred framework without burning too many tok…

Really shows something about how hard scaling reliable compute is that even Google is having to panic ban people from using Antigravity to avoid service degradation... 

The world is so short of compute right now
